codeReview.summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit diff for the Macro Thesis surface. The implementation adds the macro-thesis graph node, registers the surface in the graph explorer, introduces a typed content model in src/content, and renders the requested geopolitical, crypto, and prediction-market figures with visible @tradebetterapp attribution, MaturityBadge labels, and shadcn-card-backed content blocks. I did not find any blocking correctness, coverage, or regression issues against the feature description or VAL-CONTENT-001 through VAL-CONTENT-004.

summary: Pass. The reviewed implementation satisfies the Macro Thesis content-depth contract: the graph node is wired in, the surface exposes the required exact figures and references, and attribution/badge/card requirements are met with no blocking issues found.
